description: Analyze the elevation profile of the 'fells_loop' track in Garmin BaseCamp to identify the point of maximum elevation. Create a waypoint named 'Summit' at this highest point. Record the elevation in meters and the coordinates in decimal degrees to C:\workspace\summit_report.txt, with the elevation on the first line, latitude on the second, and longitude on the third. Export the track and the new waypoint as a GPX file to C:\workspace\summit_export.gpx.
